hooks.command: jq '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", updatedInput: {command: ("export NVM_DIR=$HOME/.nvm; [ -s $NVM_DIR/nvm.sh ] && . $NVM_DIR/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1; nvmrc_path=$(nvm_find_nvmrc 2>/dev/null); [ -n \"$nvmrc_path\" ] && nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; " + .tool_input.command)}}}'
